prompt: Create a hyper-realistic collectible fine-art landscape photograph inspired by ancient Chinese mountain travel writing: a perilous plank road carved into a vertical cliff in a remote misty mountain gorge. The scene shows exactly two living subjects on the narrow path: one lone traveler in simple dark traditional mountain clothing walking away from the camera, and one small pack donkey or mule loaded with bundled brown cargo. The path clings to the left side of the frame beneath a towering wet rock wall, made of uneven stone slabs and rough wooden support beams jutting out over a sheer drop. The right and center of the image open into a vast abyss filled with drifting white-gray clouds and fog, with multiple jagged forested peaks and dark limestone cliffs receding into the distance. Use a moody overcast sky, cold blue-gray color grading, damp rock textures, sparse green vegetation on ledges, and soft diffused natural light after rain. Compose as a professional documentary adventure photograph from a slightly elevated viewpoint looking along the cliff trail into the gorge, wide-angle but natural perspective, deep depth of field, cinematic realism, high detail, no fantasy architecture, no modern objects, no text, no watermark. The atmosphere should feel dangerous, ancient, quiet, and awe-inspiring, as if captured by a top National Geographic photographer in a real hidden mountain pass. Customize the source mood as ancient Chinese mountain travel writing, the location as remote misty Chinese gorge, the main traveler as lone traveler in simple dark traditional mountain clothing, the pack animal as small pack donkey loaded with brown bundled cargo, and the weather as overcast after-rain fog.
